optimality_note: Solved via exact dynamic-programming knapsack (not greedy ranking) — guaranteed optimal allocation given the modelled diminishing-returns curve. A naive 'fill highest-ROI zone first' approach would have under-allocated to secondary hotspots once the top zone hit diminishing returns.
plan_narrative: With 14 officers and 4 tow trucks today: optimal allocation recovers 111.6 CI-points citywide (vs. naive single-zone stacking). Top allocation: Safina Plaza Junction gets 2 officer(s); 8 zones receive coverage out of 8 total.
